brionna jones.comment: Jones is listed as doubtful for Saturday's game versus the Fire.

angel reese.comment: Reese (leg) is questionable for Saturday's game against the Fire.

maddy westbeld.comment: Westbeld (coach's decision) is listed as out for Friday's game versus the Sparks.

chloe bibby.comment: Bibby (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Sparks.

skylar diggins.comment: Diggins (knee) is listed as out for Friday's game against the Sparks.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

saniya rivers.comment: Rivers (ankle) is expected to return to game action by the end of next week, Maggie Vanoni of Hearst reports.

ashlon jackson.comment: Jackson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Golden State.

aneesah morrow.comment: Morrow (reconditioning) is out for Friday's game against Golden State.

brittney griner.comment: Griner (quadriceps) is out for Friday's game against the Valkyries.

costanza verona.comment: Verona (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Tempo.

haley jones.comment: Jones (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Tempo.

gabby williams.comment: Williams (back) is listed as out for Friday's game versus Connecticut.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game in Connecticut.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Sun.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) posted nine points (4-12 FG, 1-6 3Pt), four rebounds, three assists and one steal across 16 minutes in Wednesday's 106-92 loss to the Sparks. She won't play in Thursday's game against Phoenix, Scott Agness of FieldhouseFiles.com reports.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) is listed as out for Saturday's game against Phoenix.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) is questionable for Saturday's game against the Mercury.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

leonie fiebich.comment: Fiebich (foot) is out for Saturday game against the Lynx.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb (knee) is questionable for Saturday's game in Las Vegas.

jovana nogic.comment: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

sarah ashlee barker.comment: Barker (not with team) is listed as out for Saturday's game against the Dream.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (finger) is questionable for Saturday's game against the Dream.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) is out for Thursday's game against the Dream.

ornella bankole.comment: Bankole (coach's decision) won't play Friday against the Wings.

nyara sabally.comment: Sabally (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Wings.

temi fagbenle.comment: Fagbenle (concussion) is out for Friday's game against the Wings.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

kiki rice.comment: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

sonia citron.comment: Citron (knee) is out for Monday's game against the Valkyries.

darianna littlepage-buggs.comment: Littlepage-Buggs (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Monday's game against Golden State.
